zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn於1407年5月2日出生在英國藍卡爾布林德爾時，他的父親Sir John Gerard of Bryn27歲，母親Alice Boteler30歲。他於1428年7月1日之前與Isabel Strangways在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1447年3月26日在英國藍卡爾享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn于1407年5月2日出生在英国藍卡爾布林德爾时，他的父亲Sir John Gerard of Bryn27岁，母亲Alice Boteler30岁。他于1428年7月1日之前与Isabel Strangways在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1447年3月26日在英国藍卡爾享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

variants.name: Gerardi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Enzo, Gaspare, Luigi, Rocco, Antonio, Canio, Carmine, Filippo, Francesco, Giovanni, Libero.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the ancient Germanic personal name Gerardo (see Gerard ). This surname is also found in southern France.
German and French (mainly Nord): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name German Gerhard , French Gérard (see Gerard ), using the genitive of the Latinized form Gerardus.

variants.name: Garrison
meanings: English: from a shortened form of Middle English Gerardson, a patronymic from the personal name Gerard + son, or an Anglicized form of its Dutch cognate Gerritsen . The English surname is probably in most cases of Flemish or Dutch origin. It was brought to Britain by immigrants from the Low Countries, especially in the 15th and 16th centuries.
Americanized form of Jewish   Gerson   (see   Gershon  ).
Americanized form of Dutch   Gerritsen  .

variants.name: Garrard
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Gerard  .
Altered form of French Gérard (see Gerard ).
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Geenen
meanings: Dutch, Flemish, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Geen, a pet form of Gerard .

variants.name: Gerardo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Alberto, Alfredo, Aurelio, Carlos, Jesus, Juan, Norberto, Ramon, Tomas, Ana.  Italian Antonio, Carmine, Dino, Enrico, Marco, Marco Antonio.
Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Gerardo (see Gerard ).

variants.name: Gerald
meanings: English (of Norman origin); French (Gérald): from the ancient Germanic personal name Gerald, Girald, composed of the elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ and wald ‘power, authority’. It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was fairly common, but less so than Gerard , with which it was early confused. In France the much more common variants of this surname are Géraud and Giraud .

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: English: variant of   Gerard  .

variants.name: Geron
meanings: French (Géron): from the personal name Gero, Gerone, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with the element gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, as for example Gérard (see Gerard ).
Altered form of French Guérin (see Guerin ).
English (Lancashire): of Norman origin, from the personal name Geron of ancient Germanic origin, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Gherardi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Silvio, Alessandro, Angelo, Antonio, Donato, Egidio, Ennio, Enzo, Gildo, Lucio, Luigi, Primo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Gherardo, one of themany Italian equivalents of Gerard .

variants.name: Garard
meanings: English (London and Buckinghamshire): variant of   Gerard  .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn was born on 2 May 1407, in Brindle, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, was 27 and his mother, Alice Boteler, was 30. He married Isabel Strangways before 1 July 1428, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 26 March 1447, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn est né le 2 mai 1407, à Brindle, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Boteler, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Strangways avant 1 juillet 1428, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1447, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn am 2. Mai 1407 in Brindle, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Gerard of Bryn 27 und seine Mutter Alice Boteler 30. Er hat vor 1. Juli 1428 in Lancashire, England Isabel Strangways geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. März 1447 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn è nato il il 2 maggio 1407 nel Brindle, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice Boteler, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Strangways prima del 1 luglio 1428, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 marzo 1447, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Gerard of Brynが1407年5月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアブリンドルで生まれた時，父Sir John Gerard of Brynは27歳，母Alice Botelerは30歳であった。1428年7月1日以前にイギリスランカシュアイアでIsabel Strangwaysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1447年3月26日にイギリスランカシュアイアで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn(이)가 1407년 5월 2일 영국 랭카실르 브린들일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Gerard of Bryn(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Boteler(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1428년 7월 1일 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 Isabel Strangways(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1447년 3월 26일 영국 랭카실르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.2 May 1407–26 March 1447: 2 de maio de 1407–26 de março de 1447
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn nasceu em 2 de maio de 1407, em Brindle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Boteler, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Strangways antes 1 de julho de 1428, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1447, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn родился 2 мая 1407 г. в местности бриндл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Gerard of Bryn было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Boteler, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Strangways перед 1 июля 1428 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 марта 1447 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.2 May 1407–26 March 1447: 2 de mayo de 1407–26 de marzo de 1447
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn nació el 2 de mayo de 1407, en Brindle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alice Boteler, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Isabel Strangways antes de 1 de julio de 1428, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1447, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
